name: wakewait
description: Low-token shell sleep and wait for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Low-token shell sleep and wait for Codex.
interface.longDescription: WakeWait is a skill-only Codex plugin with bundled PowerShell and POSIX shell scripts for sleep, wait-file, wait-contains, and wait-command. The skill stays short while scripts handle duration parsing, polling, timeouts, and timestamps without model polling or persistent state.
defaultPrompt: Use WakeWait for a 10-minute shell sleep.
Wait for an output file with the bundled WakeWait shell script.
Install the WakeWait v2 skill and scripts.
